name: Gilligan's Island
description: The 1964-1967 CBS castaway sitcom — seven shipwrecked castaways on a three-hour tour that went on a bit too long.

questions.q: How many castaways are stranded on Gilligan's Island?

source.notes: Gilligan, Skipper, Howells, Ginger, the Professor, Mary Ann.

questions.q: What is the name of the charter boat that strands the castaways on the island?

source.notes: Named after FCC Chair Newton Minow (with one 'n').

questions.q: How long was the castaways' original tour supposed to last — as the theme song tells us?

source.notes: 'A three-hour tour.'

questions.q: Who plays bumbling first-mate Gilligan?

source.notes: Denver also starred in The Many Loves of Dobie Gillis.

questions.q: What is the Skipper's actual name on the show?

source.notes: Played by Alan Hale Jr.

questions.q: Which character is a Hollywood movie star stranded with the group?

source.notes: Marilyn Monroe-style bombshell played by Tina Louise.

questions.q: Who is the wealthy millionaire of the group, complete with his wife Lovey?

source.notes: Played by Jim Backus, also the voice of Mr. Magoo.

questions.q: Which character is the brainy MacGyver-style inventor who builds things out of coconuts and bamboo?

source.notes: Professor Roy Hinkley, played by Russell Johnson.

questions.q: Who plays wholesome farm girl Mary Ann Summers?

source.notes: Wells was the last surviving principal cast member; she died in 2020.

questions.q: Mary Ann is a farm girl from which U.S. state in the show?

source.notes: From Winfield, Kansas, per the pilot.

questions.q: Who created Gilligan's Island (and later The Brady Bunch)?

source.notes: Schwartz co-wrote the theme with George Wyle.

questions.q: On which U.S. television network did Gilligan's Island originally air?
How many seasons of Gilligan's Island aired on CBS?

source.notes: Three seasons, 98 episodes.

questions.q: In what year did Gilligan's Island premiere on CBS?

source.notes: Premiered September 26, 1964.

questions.q: The show's theme song is typically called what?

source.notes: The opening originally omitted the Professor and Mary Ann — 'and the rest.'

questions.q: In the show's opening, what are the seven castaways said to be set for?

source.notes: Ironically, they're stranded for three seasons.

questions.q: What was the pilot episode originally titled?

source.notes: The unaired pilot finally aired in 1992.

questions.q: Which actress refused to appear in any of the post-series reunion TV movies?

source.notes: Ginger was recast in the reunion films.

questions.q: Which Gilligan's Island cast member later voiced Mr. Magoo in animation?

source.notes: Backus voiced Magoo from the 1940s through the 1980s.

questions.q: The SS Minnow got its name as a reference to which government figure?

source.notes: Minow's 1961 'vast wasteland' speech criticized TV; Schwartz returned fire.

questions.q: In the show's original run, how many episodes were shot in black and white?

source.notes: Seasons 2 and 3 were in color.

questions.q: In the 1978 reunion TV movie Rescue from Gilligan's Island, the castaways are finally saved — what natural disaster prompts it?
choices: A tidal wave carrying a space capsule

source.notes: Space debris falls on the island and the castaways build a raft to get home.
